agendaItem.title: Agenda Item
agendaItem.description: A Notion-style agenda item with linked tasks, priority tags, geolocation, notes, and photos.

title.description: Name or title of the item (e.g., SI/OSE/AL format)

semana.description: The week number of the item

status.description: Current status (e.g., PROGRAMADO, REPROGRAMADO, CONCLUIDO, PENDENTE)

location.description: Optional coordinate and name representing geolocation

tasks.description: List of checkboxes/subtasks linked with the date/item

photos.description: List of base64 images or image URLs attached to the item

ownerId.description: Identifier of the user who owns this item

agendaItems/{itemId}.description: Collection of all items inside the agenda
